column1: I talk about you. - Do you talk about ___?
He is a good boy. Do you know ___?
He gives his girlfriend a beautiful bracelet. - He gives ___ a beautiful bracelet.
I ask him for advice. - He gives ___ good advice.
We are in front of him. He looks at ___.
I am in the street. He sees ___.
Do you like this dress? I want to buy this dress for ___.
He is a good man. I know ___ very well.
I write a letter to my parents. I write a letter to ___.
Where do you go? I want to go with ___.
